use_cases: Display customer testimonials with animated transitions on product landing pages
Showcase social proof in SaaS marketing sites with author avatars and roles
Present user reviews in e-commerce product pages with smooth quote changes
Build trust sections in fintech applications with carousel-style testimonials
Create testimonial sections in portfolio or agency websites with hover interactions
ai_summary: A testimonial carousel component featuring animated quote transitions with author avatars, names, and professional roles. The component cycles through customer testimonials with smooth opacity-based fade animations triggered by user clicks, displaying large decorative quotation marks and supporting hover states on navigation indicators. Designed as a reusable social proof element for marketing pages, landing pages, and product showcases across SaaS, e-commerce, and fintech platforms.
